title: context_update SSE Event
description: Notifies the client that the AI agent's active context has changed (new document loaded, entity resolved, conversation intent reclassified, etc.). The client uses this to refresh context-sensitive UI (breadcrumbs, pane titles, capability badges).

contextType.description: The category of context that changed.

contextId.description: Stable identifier for the context object (e.g. document ID, entity record ID, conversation ID).

delta.description: Differential description of the context change.

added.description: Keys or item IDs added to context.

removed.description: Keys or item IDs removed from context.

modified.description: Keys or item IDs whose values changed.

confidence.description: Model confidence in the context classification (0.0 = low, 1.0 = high).
